pack_non_negotiable.finding: Byte-identity HOLDS, but the documented reason ('pack documents never reach the third tier') is false. Tier 3 is reached on 14/16 pack documents and the model accepted 32 nominations; nothing moved because `found` already held those fields. The blank-only gate preserves the bytes, not unreachability.
